title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
